CreateApplication.description: Grants permission to create an application within an environment

CreateEnvironment.description: Grants permission to create an environment

CreateRoute.description: Grants permission to create a route within an application

CreateService.description: Grants permission to create a service within an application

DeleteApplication.description: Grants permission to delete an application from an environment

DeleteEnvironment.description: Grants permission to delete an environment

DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete a resource policy

DeleteRoute.description: Grants permission to delete a route from an application

DeleteService.description: Grants permission to delete a service from an application

GetApplication.description: Grants permission to get more information about an application

GetEnvironment.description: Grants permission to get more information for an environment

GetResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to get the details about a resource policy

GetRoute.description: Grants permission to get more information about a route

GetService.description: Grants permission to get more information about a service

ListApplications.description: Grants permission to list all the applications in an environment

ListEnvironmentVpcs.description: Grants permission to list all the VPCs for the environment

ListEnvironments.description: Grants permission to list all environments

ListRoutes.description: Grants permission to list all the routes in an application

ListServices.description: Grants permission to list all the services in an environment

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list all the tags for a given resource

PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to add a resource policy

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove a tag from a resource

UpdateRoute.description: Grants permission to update a route from an application

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request

refactor-spaces:ApplicationCreatedByAcco.description: Filters access by restricting the action to only those accounts that created the application within an environment

refactor-spaces:CreatedByAccountIds.description: Filters access by the accounts that created the resource

refactor-spaces:RouteCreatedByAccount.description: Filters access by restricting the action to only those accounts that created the route within an application

refactor-spaces:ServiceCreatedByAccount.description: Filters access by restricting the action to only those accounts that created the service within an application

refactor-spaces:SourcePath.description: Filters access by the path of the route
